authorizedData: the four source-pinned read-only demand-coordinate inputs
current repository truth and historical governed evidence
public GitHub repository metadata, trees, licenses, README files, SKILL.md files, and the minimum references required for bounded classification or representative review
dated local native, official, runtime, installed, visible, and already-authorized capability metadata without setup mutation or private-data expansion
authorizedSequence: extract governed demand records from the pinned STM, P, and SG inputs
build a dated native, official, runtime, installed, and already-authorized capability baseline
discover bounded public candidate metadata only for uncovered or uncertain demand coordinates
cluster, deduplicate, and select minimum representatives
pin sources and deep-review representative instructions and executable surfaces without executing them
compare native, single-Skill, composed-Skill, Recipe, Hook, other Harness, project-standard, and human-authority alternatives
support, hold, or reject residual gaps before any later carrier decision
blockedActions: executing candidate code, scripts, Hooks, commands, dependencies, or network-capable payloads
installing, enabling, connecting, authenticating, authorizing OAuth, exposing credentials, paying, or entering private data domains
mutating Codex, agents, cc-switch, Claude, TRAE, WorkBuddy, or another live runtime
writing codex-user-config, YIYUAN-CALIBRATION, YIYUAN-ASSETS, YIYUAN-MERIDIAN, or another repository
admitting a Skill, mutating the release manifest or generated routing projection, authoring a gap-fill Skill, enabling a Hook, or promoting a standard
remote push, publication, release, deployment, or global completion claim

effectiveState.nextRequiredEvidence: governed Round 03 demand records and dated native/runtime baseline before public candidate metadata discovery

verification: the accepted rebaseline and demand input contract exist at the accepted commit
program, round, lifecycle, and acceptance state all reference this event
Round 03 execution is active while candidate execution, runtime mutation, cross-repository writes, release mutation, standard promotion, and remote push remain false
demand and baseline evidence precede candidate metadata discovery
repository verifier, topology check, manifest check, routing simulation, tests, and diff check pass
residualLimits: owner acceptance authorizes the bounded research transaction but does not prove any demand coordinate is a residual gap
public metadata and static source review do not prove behavioral coverage, safety, portability, or maintenance quality
one Codex environment cannot prove universal cross-Agent behavior
later candidate execution, admission, repository authoring, Hook enablement, standards delivery, cross-repository writes, publication, push, or closeout require their own evidence and gate
nextGate: verified demand records and native/runtime baseline before public candidate metadata discovery
